name: Shadow Travelling Volta
preceding_figure_names: Cruzados Walks and Locks,Maypole,Foot Change 1: Closed Position to Right Shadow Position,Foot Change 8: Right Side Position to Right Shadow Position,Maypole,Natural Basic Movement,Reverse Basic Movement,Samba Walk in PP: LF,Shadow Circular Volta with LF,Shadow Traveling Volta commenced with LF,Side Basic Movement,Traveling Bota Fogos Forward
following_figure_names: Samba Walk in PP: LF (same foot),Traveling Bota Fogos Forward (LF),Shadow Traveling Volta commenced with LF,Shadow Circular Volta with LF,Contra Bota Fogos (Same Foot Bota Fogo to R Contra Postion),Cruzados Walks and Locks (RF),Samba Walk in PP: RF (same foot),Traveling Bota Fogos Forward (RF),Shadow Traveling Volta commenced with RF,Shadow Circular Volta with RF,Contra Bota Fogos (Same Foot Bota Fogo to R Contra Postion),Cruzados Walks and Locks (RF)
notes: Silver & Gold: After 2 bars of Traveling Volta, continue with 2 bars of Shadow Circular Volta or vice versa. Count: "1 a 2 a 3 a 4 a 5 a 6 a7 a 8". The last 2 steps of Shadow Traveling Volta may be replaced with 2 & 3 of a Bota Fogo. (Amount of Turn unchanged.)

steps.action: Begin Traveling Volta, commence with RF moving to L, curving up to 3/8 R
